text:
The opening ceremony of the 2024 Paris Olympics has drawn significant backlash for its depiction of Leonardo da Vinci's painting "The Last Supper" with a "drag queen" performance, which many view as disrespectful to religious beliefs, News.Az reports citing Anadolu Agency.

title: Paris Olympics opening ceremony draws criticism for disrespecting religious beliefs | News.az
